src: A sleek domestic short-haired ginger cat with tabby stripes, large alert ears, and wide golden eyes. Its fur is smooth and glossy in sunlight, with a lean athletic body.
edit: An intricately crafted animal-shaped balloon with orange and white striped pattern like a ginger tabby cat. It features shiny surfaces, amber eyes, and exaggerated whiskers and ears with playful details.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object lays on its right side (left side of the frame), covered with dry leaves and sunlight patches amidst dense foliage, surrounded by leafy plants. Lighting creates a dappled effect over the scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: the object is sitting upright on an uneven surface of dry leaves and green grass in a woodland setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: the object sits centrally on dry leaves with scattered greenery, enclosed by thick bushes in a forest.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object sits off-center with an alert posture among brown leaves and tufts of grass, enveloped in shadow, surrounded by interwoven branches and undergrowth.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: the object is a close-up with the face in focus against a blurry backdrop of dark woods and greenery, contrasting the light on the face with the dark environment.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object lies on the ground, leaned on its right side (left side of the frame) surrounded by golden and red leaves. Sunlight creates patterns through branches above, highlighting marigold yellow and rustic orange foliage.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: An object is perched on a bed of vibrant fallen leaves in orange, crimson, and gold, with patches of mossy green grass, beneath bare branches.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: An object rests amidst amber leaves with green patches, enclosed by dense bushes of red and yellow. The forest surrounds the scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object is off-center, among golden and crimson autumn leaves, tufts of amber grass, within dappled shadow of the low sun. Surrounding branches have rust and ochre hues, with undergrowth of earthy browns and yellows.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: Close-up of face in autumn sunlight, against a backdrop of amber and golden leaves with hints of evergreen. The warm light enhances the rich colors of autumn, with darker environment highlighting the season's palette.
